mapper.sql: id, drug_id, batch_no, produce_date, expire_date, stock_in_date, quantity, cost_price, supplier_id, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_batch_table (drug_id, batch_no, produce_date, expire_date, stock_in_date, quantity, cost_price, supplier_id, status) VALUES (#{drugId}, #{batchNo}, #{produceDate}, #{expireDate}, #{stockInDate}, #{quantity}, #{costPrice}, #{supplierId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM stock_batch_table WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} ORDER BY expire_date ASC
SELECT FROM stock_batch_table WHERE status = 1 AND DATEDIFF(expire_date, NOW()) <= #{days} AND DATEDIFF(expire_date, NOW()) >= 0 ORDER BY expire_date ASC

SELECT sb.id, sb.drug_id, sb.batch_no, sb.produce_date, sb.expire_date, sb.stock_in_date, sb.quantity, sb.cost_price, sb.supplier_id, sb.status, sb.create_time, sb.update_time FROM stock_batch_table sb JOIN drug_table d ON sb.drug_id = d.id WHERE sb.status = 1 AND sb.quantity < d.stock_min ORDER BY sb.quantity ASC
